arts.ttl: Al-Nassr end attempts to sign Brighton's Mitoma
arts.sum: Al-Nassr end their attempts to sign Brighton's Kaoru Mitoma after the Seagulls make it clear they have no intention of selling the Japan forward.

arts.ttl: Brighton’s Valentín Barco set for Strasbourg move
arts.sum: Brighton and Hove Albion’s Valentín Barco (20), currently on loan at Sevilla, is set to join RC Strasbourg Alsace, according to a report from Foot Mercato. Since joining Brighton one year…

arts.ttl: Report: Saudi club will now try to sign £150m Arsenal target after missing out on Brighton's Kaoru Mitoma
arts.sum: It wouldn’t be a transfer window in the modern-era without the Saudi Arabian clubs getting involved and it looks like Al-Nassr could be at it...

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Brighton Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest host Brighton in the Premier League on Saturday afternoon. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted line-ups for both teams, and picked...

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest target closes in on exit, but Sunderland are in the race
arts.sum: He's available for a bargain fee...

arts.ttl: 'Sell-on clause' - Fabrizio Romano issues shock update as Brighton ace leaves after just 12 months
arts.sum: All the latest transfer news and gossip for Brighton and Hove Albion and across the Premier League

arts.ttl: Brighton defender Tariq Lamptey set to join Ajax with forward Chuba Akpom poised to leave the Dutch club for Lille
arts.sum: JOE BERNSTEIN: The Dutch giants are ready to pay a cut price £1.5million for 24-year-old Lamptey with the pacey full-back out of contract this summer.

arts.ttl: Brighton to sell Tariq Lamptey to Premier League rival in cut-price move?
arts.sum: Leicester City are reportedly exploring a cut-price deal for Brighton & Hove Albion defender Tariq Lamptey before the end of the winter window.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr, Tiago Djalo to Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr and Tiago Djalo to Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Luton sign ex-Everton winger on loan from Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Fifth new addition of the transfer window for the Hatters
